summary: No new verified oncology development cleared the bar on 16 July 2026, leaving Gedatolisib + Fulvestrant and the existing caution signals at the top of the briefing.

headlines.title: No new oncology development cleared the bar
headlines.summary: Official-source checks did not justify promoting a newer oncology item into the briefing.

headlines.title: Gedatolisib + Fulvestrant remained the lead verified approval
Galleri-NHS negative screening signal remained an active caution signal
headlines.summary: This is a major cautionary signal for population blood-based multi-cancer screening. A negative primary endpoint should slow premature adoption and reshape how MCED claims are presented to payers and the public.
